name: Quaero Institutional
tagline: Teal-and-navy corporate deck with Quaero brand identity; clean, technical, and trustworthy.

palette.description: White base with Quaero teal primary, navy secondary, and warm orange accent; cream card backgrounds for data-heavy slides

typography.style: clean sans-serif pairing; CJK-optimized with Source Sans 3 for Latin and Noto Sans SC for Chinese

best_for: Anything that should feel corporate-technical and trustworthy: instrument and device reviews, engineering presentations, internal technical reports, project demos, bilingual EN/CN technical decks. Also a solid choice for any B2B, medical-device, or lab-equipment context where the deck should read as institutional and precise.
avoid_for: Contexts that need warmth, playfulness, or editorial flair — the teal-navy palette and institutional footer commit to a corporate-technical voice.
navigation: inline keyboard handler with on-page slide counter
